text: ' bshnt shlvsh lmlkhvt yhvyqym mlkh yhvdh--b' nbvkhdn'tsr mlkh bbl yrvshlm vytsr 'lyh
b vytn 'dny bydv 't yhvyqym mlkh yhvdh vmqtst khly byt h'lhym vyby'm 'rts shn'r byt 'lhyv v't hkhlym hby' byt 'vtsr 'lhyv
g vy'mr hmlkh l'shfnz rb srysyv lhby' mbny yshr'l vmzr' hmlvkhh--vmn hfrtmym
d yldym 'shr 'yn bhm khl m'vm vtvby mr'h vmshkhlym bkhl chkhmh vyd'y d't vmbyny md' v'shr khch bhm l'md bhykhl hmlkh vllmdm sfr vlshvn khshdym
h vymn lhm hmlkh dbr yvm byvmv mft bg hmlkh vmyyn mshtyv vlgdlm shnym shlvsh vmqtstm--y'mdv lfny hmlkh
v vyhy bhm mbny yhvdh--dny'l chnnyh mysh'l v'zryh
z vyshm lhm shr hsrysym shmvt vyshm ldny'l bltsh'tsr vlchnnyh shdrkh vlmysh'l myshkh vl'zryh 'bd ngv
ch vyshm dny'l 'l lbv 'shr l' ytg'l bft bg hmlkh vbyyn mshtyv vybqsh mshr hsrysym 'shr l' ytg'l
t vytn h'lhym 't dny'l lchsd vlrchmym lfny shr hsrysym
y vy'mr shr hsrysym ldny'l--yr' 'ny 't 'dny hmlkh 'shr mnh 't m'khlkhm v't mshtykhm 'shr lmh yr'h 't fnykhm z'fym mn hyldym 'shr khgylkhm vchybtm 't r'shy lmlkh
y' vy'mr dny'l 'l hmltsr--'shr mnh shr hsrysym 'l dny'l chnnyh mysh'l v'zryh
yb ns n' 't 'bdykh ymym 'shrh vytnv lnv mn hzr'ym vn'khlh--vmym vnshth
yg vyr'v lfnykh mr'ynv vmr'h hyldym h'khlym 't ft bg hmlkh vkh'shr tr'h 'shh 'm 'bdykh
yd vyshm' lhm ldbr hzh vynsm ymym 'shrh
tv vmqtst ymym 'shrh nr'h mr'yhm tvb vbry'y bshr mn khl hyldym--h'khlym 't ft bg hmlkh
tz vyhy hmltsr nsh' 't ft bgm vyyn mshtyhm vntn lhm zr'nym
yz vhyldym h'lh 'rb'tm ntn lhm h'lhym md' vhshkhl bkhl sfr vchkhmh vdny'l hbyn bkhl chzvn vchlmvt
ych vlmqtst hymym 'shr 'mr hmlkh lhby'm vyby'm shr hsrysym lfny nbkhdntsr
yt vydbr 'tm hmlkh vl' nmts' mkhlm khdny'l chnnyh mysh'l v'zryh vy'mdv lfny hmlkh
kh vkhl dbr chkhmt bynh 'shr bqsh mhm hmlkh--vymts'm 'shr ydvt 'l khl hchrtmym h'shfym 'shr bkhl mlkhvtv
kh' vyhy dny'l 'd shnt 'cht lkhvrsh hmlkh {f}
' vbshnt shtym lmlkhvt nbkhdntsr chlm nbkhdntsr chlmvt vttf'm rvchv vshntv nhyth 'lyv
b vy'mr hmlkh lqr' lchrtmym vl'shfym vlmkhshfym vlkhshdym lhgyd lmlkh chlmtyv vyb'v vy'mdv lfny hmlkh
g vy'mr lhm hmlkh chlvm chlmty vtf'm rvchy ld't 't hchlvm
d vydbrv hkhshdym lmlkh 'rmyt mlkh' l'lmyn chyy--'mr chlm' l'bdykh (l'bdkh) vfshr' nchv'
h 'nh mlkh' v'mr lkhshdy' (lkhshd'y) mlth mny 'zd' hn l' thvd'vnny chlm' vfshrh hdmyn tt'bdvn vbtykhvn nvly ytshmvn
v vhn chlm' vfshrh thchvn mtnn vnbzbh vyqr shgy' tqblvn mn qdmy lhn chlm' vfshrh hchvny
z 'nv tnynvt v'mryn mlkh' chlm' y'mr l'bdvhy vfshrh nhchvh
ch 'nh mlkh' v'mr--mn ytsyb yd' 'nh dy 'dn' 'ntvn zbnyn khl qbl dy chzytvn dy 'zd' mny mlt'
t dy hn chlm' l' thvd'nny chdh hy' dtkhvn vmlh khdbh vshchyth hzmntvn (hzdmntvn) lm'mr qdmy 'd dy 'dn' yshtn' lhn chlm' 'mrv ly v'nd' dy fshrh thchvnny
y 'nv khshdy' (khshd'y) qdm mlkh' v'mryn--l' 'yty 'nsh 'l ybsht' dy mlt mlkh' yvkhl lhchvyh khl qbl dy khl mlkh rb vshlyt mlh khdnh l' sh'l lkhl chrtm v'shf vkhshdy
y' vmlt' dy mlkhh sh'l yqyrh v'chrn l' 'yty dy ychvnh qdm mlkh' lhn 'lhyn--dy mdrhvn 'm bshr' l' 'ytvhy
yb khl qbl dnh--mlkh' bns vqtsf shgy' v'mr lhvbdh lkhl chkhymy bbl
yg vdt' nfqt vchkhymy' mtqtlyn vb'v dny'l vchbrvhy lhtqtlh {f}
yd b'dyn dny'l htyb 't' vt'm l'ryvkh rb tbchy' dy mlkh'--dy nfq lqtlh lchkhymy bbl
tv 'nh v'mr l'ryvkh shlyt' dy mlkh' 'l mh dt' mhchtsfh mn qdm mlkh' 'dyn mlt' hvd' 'ryvkh ldny'l
tz vdny'l 'l vb'h mn mlkh' dy zmn yntn lh vfshr' lhchvyh lmlkh' {f}
yz 'dyn dny'l lbyth 'zl vlchnnyh mysh'l v'zryh chbrvhy mlt' hvd'
ych vrchmyn lmb'' mn qdm 'lh shmy' 'l rz' dnh--dy l' yhvbdvn dny'l vchbrvhy 'm sh'r chkhymy bbl
yt 'dyn ldny'l bchzv' dy lyly'--rz' gly 'dyn dny'l brkh l'lh shmy'
kh 'nh dny'l v'mr--lhv' shmh dy 'lh' mbrkh mn 'lm' v'd 'lm' dy chkhmt' vgbvrt' dy lh hy'
kh' vhv' mhshn' 'dny' vzmny' mh'dh mlkhyn vmhqym mlkhyn yhb chkhmt' lchkhymyn vmnd'' lyd'y bynh
khb hv' gl' 'myqt' vmstrt' yd' mh bchshvkh' vnhyr' (vnhvr') 'mh shr'
khg lkh 'lh 'bhty mhvd' vmshbch 'nh dy chkhmt' vgbvrt' yhbt ly vkh'n hvd'tny dy b'yn' mnkh dy mlt mlkh' hvd'tn'
khd khl qbl dnh dny'l 'l 'l 'ryvkh dy mny mlkh' lhvbdh lchkhymy bbl 'zl vkhn 'mr lh lchkhymy bbl 'l thvbd--h'lny qdm mlkh' vfshr' lmlkh' 'chv' {s}
khh 'dyn 'ryvkh bhtbhlh hn'l ldny'l qdm mlkh' vkhn 'mr lh dy hshkhcht gbr mn bny glvt' dy yhvd dy fshr' lmlkh' yhvd'
khv 'nh mlkh' v'mr ldny'l dy shmh bltsh'tsr h'ytykh (h'ytkh) khhl lhvd'tny chlm' dy chzyt--vfshrh
khz 'nh dny'l qdm mlkh' v'mr rz' dy mlkh' sh'l--l' chkhymyn 'shfyn chrtmyn gzryn ykhlyn lhchvyh lmlkh'
khch brm 'yty 'lh bshmy' gl' rzyn vhvd' lmlkh' nbvkhdntsr mh dy lhv' b'chryt yvmy' chlmkh vchzvy r'shkh 'l mshkhbkh dnh hv' {f}
kht 'nth ('nt) mlkh' r'yvnkh 'l mshkhbkh slqv mh dy lhv' 'chry dnh vgl' rzy' hvd'kh mh dy lhv'
l v'nh l' bchkhmh dy 'yty by mn khl chyy' rz' dnh gly ly lhn 'l dbrt dy fshr' lmlkh' yhvd'vn vr'yvny lbbkh tnd'
l' 'nth ('nt) mlkh' chzh hvyt v'lv tslm chd shgy'--tslm' dkhn rb vzyvh ytyr q'm lqblkh vrvh dchyl
lb hv' tslm' r'shh dy dhb tb chdvhy vdr'vhy dy khsf m'vhy vyrkhth dy nchsh
lg shqvhy dy frzl rglvhy--mnhvn (mnhn) dy frzl vmnhvn (vmnhn) dy chsf
ld chzh hvyt 'd dy htgzrt 'bn dy l' bydyn vmcht ltslm' 'l rglvhy dy frzl' vchsf' vhdqt hmvn
lh b'dyn dqv khchdh frzl' chsf' nchsh' khsf' vdhb' vhvv kh'vr mn 'dry qyt vnsh' hmvn rvch' vkhl 'tr l' hshtkhch lhvn v'bn' dy mcht ltslm' hvt ltvr rb--vml't khl 'r''
lv dnh chlm' vfshrh n'mr qdm mlkh'
lz 'nth ('nt) mlkh' mlkh mlkhy' dy 'lh shmy' mlkhvt' chsn' vtqf' vyqr' yhb lkh
lch vbkhl dy d'ryn (dyryn) bny 'nsh' chyvt br' v'vf shmy' yhb bydkh vhshltkh bkhlhvn 'nth ('nt) hv' r'shh dy dhb'
lt vbtrkh tqvm mlkhv 'chry--'r'' ('r') mnkh vmlkhv tlyty' (tlyt'h) 'chry dy nchsh' dy tshlt bkhl 'r''
m vmlkhv rby'yh (rby''h) thv' tqyfh khfrzl' khl qbl dy frzl' mhdq vchshl khl' vkhfrzl' dy mr'' khl 'ln tdq vtr'
m' vdy chzyth rgly' v'tsb't' mnhvn (mnhn) chsf dy fchr vmnhvn (vmnhn) frzl--mlkhv flygh thvh vmn ntsbt' dy frzl' lhv' bh khl qbl dy chzyth frzl' m'rb bchsf tyn'
mb v'tsb't rgly' mnhvn (mnhn) frzl vmnhvn (vmnhn) chsf--mn qtst mlkhvt' thvh tqyfh vmnh thv' tbyrh
mg dy (vdy) chzyt frzl' m'rb bchsf tyn'--mt'rbyn lhvn bzr' 'nsh' vl' lhvn dbqyn dnh 'm dnh h' khdy frzl' l' mt'rb 'm chsf'
md vbyvmyhvn dy mlkhy' 'nvn yqym 'lh shmy' mlkhv dy l'lmyn l' ttchbl vmlkhvth l'm 'chrn l' tshtbq tdq vtsyf khl 'lyn mlkhvt' vhy' tqvm l'lmy'
mh khl qbl dy chzyt dy mtvr' 'tgzrt 'bn dy l' bydyn vhdqt frzl' nchsh' chsf' khsf' vdhb'--'lh rb hvd' lmlkh' mh dy lhv' 'chry dnh vytsyb chlm' vmhymn fshrh {f}
mv b'dyn mlkh' nbvkhdntsr nfl 'l 'nfvhy vldny'l sgd vmnchh vnychchyn 'mr lnskhh lh
mz 'nh mlkh' ldny'l v'mr mn qsht dy 'lhkhvn hv' 'lh 'lhyn vmr' mlkhyn--vglh rzyn dy ykhlt lmgl' rz' dnh
mch 'dyn mlkh' ldny'l rby vmtnn rbrbn shgy'n yhb lh vhshlth 'l khl mdynt bbl vrb sgnyn--'l khl chkhymy bbl
mt vdny'l b'' mn mlkh' vmny 'l 'bydt' dy mdynt bbl lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv vdny'l btr' mlkh' {f}
' nbvkhdntsr mlkh' 'bd tslm dy dhb rvmh 'myn shtyn ftyh 'myn sht 'qymh bbq't dvr' bmdynt bbl
b vnbvkhdntsr mlkh' shlch lmkhnsh l'chshdrfny' sgny' vfchvt' 'drgzry' gdbry' dtbry' tfty' vkhl shltny mdynt'--lmt' lchnkht tslm' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr mlkh'
g b'dyn mtkhnshyn 'chshdrfny' sgny' vfchvt' 'drgzry' gdbry' dtbry' tfty' vkhl shltny mdynt' lchnkht tslm' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr mlkh' vq'myn (vqymyn) lqbl tslm' dy hqym nbkhdntsr
d vkhrvz' qr' bchyl lkhvn 'mryn 'mmy' 'my' vlshny'
h b'dn' dy tshm'vn ql qrn' mshrvqyt' qytrs (qtrs) shbkh' fsntryn svmfny' vkhl zny zmr'--tflvn vtsgdvn ltslm dhb' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr mlkh'
v vmn dy l' yfl vysgd--bh sh't' ytrm' lgv' 'tvn nvr' yqdt'
z khl qbl dnh bh zmn' khdy shm'yn khl 'mmy' ql qrn' mshrvqyt' qytrs (qtrs) shbkh' fsntryn vkhl zny zmr'--nflyn khl 'mmy' 'my' vlshny' sgdyn ltslm dhb' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr mlkh'
ch khl qbl dnh bh zmn' qrbv gbryn khshd'yn v'khlv qrtsyhvn dy yhvdy'
t 'nv v'mryn lnbvkhdntsr mlkh' mlkh' l'lmyn chyy
y 'nth ('nt) mlkh' shmt t'm dy khl 'nsh dy yshm' ql qrn' mshrqyt' qytrs (qtrs) shbkh' fsntryn vsyfnyh (vsvfnyh) vkhl zny zmr'--yfl vysgd ltslm dhb'
y' vmn dy l' yfl vysgd--ytrm' lgv' 'tvn nvr' yqdt'
yb 'yty gbryn yhvd'yn dy mnyt ythvn 'l 'bydt mdynt bbl shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv--gbry' 'lkh l' shmv 'lykh ('lkh) mlkh' t'm l'lhykh (l'lhkh) l' flchyn vltslm dhb' dy hqymt l' sgdyn {s}
yg b'dyn nbvkhdntsr brgz vchm' 'mr lhytyh lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv b'dyn gbry' 'lkh hytyv qdm mlkh'
yd 'nh nbvkhdntsr v'mr lhvn htsd' shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv l'lhy l' 'ytykhvn flchyn vltslm dhb' dy hqymt l' sgdyn

tv kh'n hn 'ytykhvn 'tydyn dy b'dn' dy tshm'vn ql qrn' mshrvqyt' qytrs (qtrs) shbkh' fsntryn vsvmfnyh vkhl zny zmr' tflvn vtsgdvn ltslm' dy 'bdt vhn l' tsgdvn bh sh't' ttrmvn lgv' 'tvn nvr' yqdt' vmn hv' 'lh dy yshyzbnkhvn mn ydy
tz 'nv shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv v'mryn lmlkh' nbvkhdntsr--l' chshchyn 'nchn' 'l dnh ftgm lhtbvtkh
yz hn 'yty 'lhn' dy 'nchn' flchyn--ykhl lshyzbvtn' mn 'tvn nvr' yqdt' vmn ydkh mlkh' yshyzb
ych vhn l' ydy' lhv' lkh mlkh' dy l'lhykh (l'lhkh) l' 'ytyn' ('ytn') flchyn vltslm dhb' dy hqymt l' nsgd {s}
yt b'dyn nbvkhdntsr htmly chm' vtslm 'nfvhy 'shtnv ('shtny) 'l shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv 'nh v'mr lmz' l'tvn' chd shb'h 'l dy chzh lmzyh
kh vlgbryn gbry chyl dy bchylh 'mr lkhfth lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv--lmrm' l'tvn nvr' yqdt'
kh' b'dyn gbry' 'lkh khftv bsrblyhvn ftyshyhvn (ftshyhvn) vkhrblthvn vlbshyhvn vrmyv lgv' 'tvn nvr' yqdt'
khb khl qbl dnh mn dy mlt mlkh' mchtsfh v'tvn' 'zh ytyrh gbry' 'lkh dy hsqv lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv qtl hmvn shbyb' dy nvr'
khg vgbry' 'lkh tlthvn shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv--nflv lgv' 'tvn nvr' yqdt' mkhftyn {f}
khd 'dyn nbvkhdntsr mlkh' tvh vqm bhtbhlh 'nh v'mr lhdbrvhy hl' gbryn tlth rmyn' lgv' nvr' mkhftyn 'nyn v'mryn lmlkh' ytsyb' mlkh'
khh 'nh v'mr h' 'nh chzh gbryn 'rb'h shryn mhlkhyn bgv nvr' vchbl l' 'yty bhvn vrvh dy rby'y' (rby''h) dmh lbr 'lhyn {s}
khv b'dyn qrb nbvkhdntsr ltr' 'tvn nvr' yqdt' 'nh v'mr shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv 'bdvhy dy 'lh' 'ly' ('l'h) fqv v'tv b'dyn nfqyn shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv--mn gv' nvr'
khz vmtkhnshyn 'chshdrfny' sgny' vfchvt' vhdbry mlkh'--chzyn lgbry' 'lkh dy l' shlt nvr' bgshmhvn vsh'r r'shhvn l' htchrkh vsrblyhvn l' shnv vrych nvr l' 'dt bhvn

khch 'nh nbvkhdntsr v'mr brykh 'lhhvn dy shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv dy shlch ml'khh vshyzb l'bdvhy dy htrchtsv 'lvhy vmlt mlkh' shnyv vyhbv gshmyhvn (gshmhvn) dy l' yflchvn vl' ysgdvn lkhl 'lh lhn l'lhhvn
kht vmny shym t'm dy khl 'm 'mh vlshn dy y'mr shlh (shlv) 'l 'lhhvn dy shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv' hdmyn yt'bd vbyth nvly yshtvh khl qbl dy l' 'yty 'lh 'chrn dy ykhl lhtslh khdnh

l b'dyn mlkh' htslch lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv--bmdynt bbl {f} [ (Daniel 3:31) l' nbvkhdntsr mlkh' lkhl 'mmy' 'my' vlshny' dy d'ryn (dyryn) bkhl 'r''--shlmkhvn yshg' ] [ (Daniel 3:32) lb 'ty' vtmhy' dy 'bd 'my 'lh' 'ly' ('l'h)--shfr qdmy lhchvyh ] [ (Daniel 3:33) lg 'tvhy khmh rbrbyn vtmhvhy khmh tqyfyn mlkhvth mlkhvt 'lm vshltnh 'm dr vdr ]
' 'nh nbvkhdntsr shlh hvyt bbyty vr'nn bhykhly
b chlm chzyt vydchlnny vhrhryn 'l mshkhby vchzvy r'shy ybhlnny
g vmny shym t'm lhn'lh qdmy lkhl chkhymy bbl dy fshr chlm' yhvd'nny
d b'dyn 'llyn ('lyn) chrtmy' 'shfy' khshdy' (khshd'y) vgzry' vchlm' 'mr 'nh qdmyhvn vfshrh l' mhvd'yn ly
h v'd 'chryn 'l qdmy dny'l dy shmh bltsh'tsr khshm 'lhy vdy rvch 'lhyn qdyshyn bh vchlm' qdmvhy 'mrt
v bltsh'tsr rb chrtmy'--dy 'nh yd't dy rvch 'lhyn qdyshyn bkh vkhl rz l' 'ns lkh chzvy chlmy dy chzyt vfshrh 'mr
z vchzvy r'shy 'l mshkhby chzh hvyt--v'lv 'yln bgv 'r'' vrvmh shgy'
ch rbh 'yln' vtqf vrvmh ymt' lshmy' vchzvth lsvf khl 'r''
t 'fyh shfyr v'nbh shgy' vmzvn lkhl' bh tchtvhy ttll chyvt br' vb'nfvhy ydrvn (ydvrn) tsfry shmy' vmnh ytzyn khl bshr'
y chzh hvyt bchzvy r'shy 'l mshkhby v'lv 'yr vqdysh mn shmy' ncht
y' qr' bchyl vkhn 'mr gdv 'yln' vqtstsv 'nfvhy 'trv 'fyh vbdrv 'nbh tnd chyvt' mn tchtvhy vtsfry' mn 'nfvhy
yb brm 'qr shrshvhy b'r'' shbqv vb'svr dy frzl vnchsh bdt'' dy br' vbtl shmy' ytstb' v'm chyvt' chlqh b'shb 'r''
yg lbbh mn 'nvsh' ('nsh') yshnvn vlbb chyvh ytyhb lh vshb'h 'dnyn ychlfvn 'lvhy
yd bgzrt 'yryn ftgm' vm'mr qdyshyn sh'lt' 'd dbrt dy ynd'vn chyy' dy shlyt 'ly' ('l'h) bmlkhvt 'nvsh' ('nsh') vlmn dy ytsb' ytnnh vshfl 'nshym yqym 'lyh ('lh)
tv dnh chlm' chzyt 'nh mlkh' nbvkhdntsr v'nth (v'nt) bltsh'tsr fshr' 'mr khl qbl dy khl chkhymy mlkhvty l' ykhlyn fshr' lhvd'vtny v'nth (v'nt) khhl dy rvch 'lhyn qdyshyn bkh
tz 'dyn dny'l dy shmh bltsh'tsr 'shtvmm khsh'h chdh vr'ynhy ybhlnh 'nh mlkh' v'mr bltsh'tsr chlm' vfshr' 'l ybhlkh 'nh bltsh'tsr v'mr mr'y chlm' lshn'ykh (lshn'kh) vfshrh l'rykh (l'rkh)
yz 'yln' dy chzyt dy rbh vtqf vrvmh ymt' lshmy' vchzvth lkhl 'r''
ych v'fyh shfyr v'nbh shgy' vmzvn lkhl' bh tchtvhy tdvr chyvt br' vb'nfvhy yshkhnn tsfry shmy'
yt 'nth ('nt) hv' mlkh' dy rbyt (rbt) vtqft vrbvtkh rbt vmtt lshmy' vshltnkh lsvf 'r''

kh vdy chzh mlkh' 'yr vqdysh ncht mn shmy' v'mr gdv 'yln' vchblvhy brm 'qr shrshvhy b'r'' shbqv vb'svr dy frzl vnchsh bdt'' dy br' vbtl shmy' ytstb' v'm chyvt br' chlqh 'd dy shb'h 'dnyn ychlfvn 'lvhy
kh' dnh fshr' mlkh' vgzrt 'ly' ('l'h) hy' dy mtt 'l mr'y mlkh'
khb vlkh trdyn mn 'nsh' v'm chyvt br' lhvh mdrkh v'shb' khtvryn lkh yt'mvn vmtl shmy' lkh mtsb'yn vshb'h 'dnyn ychlfvn 'lykh ('lkh) 'd dy tnd' dy shlyt 'ly' ('l'h) bmlkhvt 'nsh' vlmn dy ytsb' ytnnh
khg vdy 'mrv lmshbq 'qr shrshvhy dy 'yln' mlkhvtkh lkh qym'--mn dy tnd' dy shltn shmy'
khd lhn mlkh' mlkhy yshfr 'lykh ('lkh) vchtykh (vcht'kh) btsdqh frq v'vytkh bmchn 'nyn hn thvh 'rkhh lshlvtkh
khh khl' mt' 'l nbvkhdntsr mlkh' {f}
khv lqtst yrchyn try 'shr 'l hykhl mlkhvt' dy bbl mhlkh hvh
khz 'nh mlkh' v'mr hl' d' hy' bbl rbt' dy 'nh bnyth lbyt mlkhv btqf chsny vlyqr hdry
khch 'vd mlt' bfm mlkh'--ql mn shmy' nfl lkh 'mryn nbvkhdntsr mlkh' mlkhvt' 'dt mnkh
kht vmn 'nsh' lkh trdyn v'm chyvt br' mdrkh 'shb' khtvryn lkh yt'mvn vshb'h 'dnyn ychlfvn 'lykh ('lkh) 'd dy tnd' dy shlyt 'ly' ('l'h) bmlkhvt 'nsh' vlmn dy ytsb' ytnnh
l bh sh't' mlt' sft 'l nbvkhdntsr vmn 'nsh' tryd v'shb' khtvryn y'khl vmtl shmy' gshmh ytstb'--'d dy sh'rh khnshryn rbh vtfrvhy khtsfryn
l' vlqtst yvmy' 'nh nbvkhdntsr 'yny lshmy' ntlt vmnd'y 'ly ytvb vl'ly' (vl'l'h) brkht vlchy 'lm' shbcht vhdrt dy shltnh shltn 'lm vmlkhvth 'm dr vdr
lb vkhl d'ry (dyry) 'r'' khlh chshybyn vkhmtsbyh 'bd bchyl shmy' vd'ry (vdyry) 'r'' vl' 'yty dy ymch' bydh vy'mr lh mh 'bdt
lg bh zmn' mnd'y ytvb 'ly vlyqr mlkhvty hdry vzyvy ytvb 'ly vly hdbry vrbrbny yb'vn v'l mlkhvty htqnt vrbv ytyrh hvsft ly
ld kh'n 'nh nbkhdntsr mshbch vmrvmm vmhdr lmlkh shmy' dy khl m'bdvhy qsht v'rchth dyn vdy mhlkhyn bgvh ykhl lhshflh {f}
' blsh'tsr mlkh' 'bd lchm rb lrbrbnvhy 'lf vlqbl 'lf' chmr' shth
b blsh'tsr 'mr bt'm chmr' lhytyh lm'ny dhb' vkhsf' dy hnfq nbvkhdntsr 'bvhy mn hykhl' dy byrvshlm vyshtvn bhvn mlkh' vrbrbnvhy shglth vlchnth
g b'dyn hytyv m'ny dhb' dy hnfqv mn hykhl' dy byt 'lh' dy byrvshlm v'shtyv bhvn mlkh' vrbrbnvhy shglth vlchnth
d 'shtyv chmr' vshbchv l'lhy dhb' vkhsf' nchsh' frzl'--''' v'bn'
h bh sh'th nfqv (nfqh) 'tsb'n dy yd 'nsh vkhtbn lqbl nbrsht' 'l gyr' dy khtl hykhl' dy mlkh' vmlkh' chzh fs yd' dy khtbh
v 'dyn mlkh' zyvhy shnvhy vr'ynhy ybhlvnh vqtry chrtsh mshtryn v'rkhbth d' ld' nqshn

z qr' mlkh' bchyl lh'lh l'shfy' khshdy' (khshd'y) vgzry' 'nh mlkh' v'mr lchkhymy bbl dy khl 'nsh dy yqrh khtbh dnh vfshrh ychvnny 'rgvn' ylbsh vhmnvkh' (vhmnykh') dy dhb' 'l tsv'rh vtlty bmlkhvt' yshlt {s}
ch 'dyn 'llyn ('lyn) khl chkhymy mlkh' vl' khhlyn khtb' lmqr' vfshr' (vfshrh) lhvd'h lmlkh'
t 'dyn mlkh' blsh'tsr shgy' mtbhl vzyvhy shnyn 'lvhy vrbrbnvhy mshtbshyn
y mlkht'--lqbl mly mlkh' vrbrbnvhy lbyt mshty' 'llt ('lt) 'nt mlkht' v'mrt mlkh' l'lmyn chyy--'l ybhlvkh r'yvnkh vzyvykh (vzyvkh) 'l yshtnv
y' 'yty gbr bmlkhvtkh dy rvch 'lhyn qdyshyn bh vbyvmy 'bvkh nhyrv vshkhltnv vchkhmh khchkhmt 'lhyn hshtkhcht bh vmlkh' nbkhdntsr 'bvkh--rb chrtmyn 'shfyn khshd'yn gzryn hqymh 'bvkh mlkh'
yb khl qbl dy rvch ytyrh vmnd' vshkhltnv mfshr chlmyn v'chvyt 'chydn vmshr' qtryn hshtkhcht bh bdny'l dy mlkh' shm shmh bltsh'tsr kh'n dny'l ytqry vfshrh yhchvh {f}
yg b'dyn dny'l h'l qdm mlkh' 'nh mlkh' v'mr ldny'l 'nth ('nt) hv' dny'l dy mn bny glvt' dy yhvd dy hyty mlkh' 'by mn yhvd
yd vshm't 'lykh ('lkh) dy rvch 'lhyn bkh vnhyrv vshkhltnv vchkhmh ytyrh hshtkhcht bkh
tv vkh'n h'lv qdmy chkhymy' 'shfy' dy khtbh dnh yqrvn vfshrh lhvd'tny vl' khhlyn fshr mlt' lhchvyh

tz v'nh shm't 'lykh ('lkh) dy tvkhl (tkhvl) fshryn lmfshr vqtryn lmshr' kh'n hn tvkhl (tkhvl) khtb' lmqr' vfshrh lhvd'vtny--'rgvn' tlbsh vhmvnkh' (vhmnykh') dy dhb' 'l tsv'rkh vtlt' bmlkhvt' tshlt {f}
yz b'dyn 'nh dny'l v'mr qdm mlkh' mtntkh lkh lhvyn vnbzbytkh l'chrn hb brm khtb' 'qr' lmlkh' vfshr' 'hvd'nh
ych 'nth ('nt) mlkh' 'lh' 'ly' ('l'h) mlkhvt' vrbvt' vyqr' vhdr' yhb lnbkhdntsr 'bvkh
yt vmn rbvt' dy yhb lh--khl 'mmy' 'my' vlshny' hvv z''yn (zy'yn) vdchlyn mn qdmvhy dy hv' tsb' hvh qtl vdy hvh tsb' hvh mch' vdy hvh tsb' hvh mrym vdy hv' tsb' hv' mshfl
kh vkhdy rm lbbh vrvchh tqft lhzdh hncht mn khrs' mlkhvth vyqrh h'dyv mnh
kh' vmn bny 'nsh' tryd vlbbh 'm chyvt' shvy (shvyv) v'm 'rdy' mdrh 'shb' khtvryn yt'mvnh vmtl shmy' gshmh ytstb' 'd dy yd' dy shlyt 'lh' 'ly' ('l'h) bmlkhvt 'nsh' vlmn dy ytsb' yhqym 'lyh ('lh)
khb v'nth (v'nt) brh blsh'tsr l' hshflt lbbkh khl qbl dy khl dnh yd't

khg v'l mr' shmy' htrvmmt vlm'ny' dy byth hytyv qdmykh (qdmkh) v'nth (v'nt) vrbrbnykh (vrbrbnkh) shgltkh vlchntkh chmr' shtyn bhvn vl'lhy khsf' vdhb' nchsh' frzl' ''' v'bn' dy l' chzyn vl' shm'yn vl' yd'yn shbcht vl'lh' dy nshmtkh bydh vkhl 'rchtkh lh--l' hdrt
khd b'dyn mn qdmvhy shlych fs' dy yd' vkhtb' dnh rshym
khh vdnh khtb' dy rshym mn' mn' tql vfrsyn
khv dnh fshr mlt' mn'--mnh 'lh' mlkhvtkh vhshlmh
khz tql--tqylt bm'zny' vhshtkhcht chsyr
khch frs--fryst mlkhvtkh vyhybt lmdy vfrs
kht b'dyn 'mr blsh'tsr vhlbshv ldny'l 'rgvn' vhmnvkh' (vhmnykh') dy dhb' 'l tsv'rh vhkhrzv 'lvhy dy lhv' shlyt tlt' bmlkhvt'
l bh blyly' qtyl bl'shtsr mlkh' khshdy' (khshd'h) {f}
' vdryvsh mdy' (md'h) qbl mlkhvt'--khbr shnyn shtyn vtrtyn
b shfr qdm dryvsh vhqym 'l mlkhvt' l'chshdrfny' m'h v'shryn--dy lhvn bkhl mlkhvt'
g v'l' mnhvn srkhyn tlth dy dny'l chd mnhvn dy lhvn 'chshdrfny' 'lyn yhbyn lhvn t'm' vmlkh' l' lhv' nzq
d 'dyn dny'l dnh hv' mtntsch 'l srkhy' v'chshdrfny' khl qbl dy rvch ytyr' bh vmlkh' 'shyt lhqmvth 'l khl mlkhvt'
h 'dyn srkhy' v'chshdrfny' hvv b'yn 'lh lhshkhchh ldny'l--mtsd mlkhvt' vkhl 'lh vshchyth l' ykhlyn lhshkhchh khl qbl dy mhymn hv' vkhl shlv vshchyth l' hshtkhcht 'lvhy
v 'dyn gbry' 'lkh 'mryn dy l' nhshkhch ldny'l dnh khl 'l' lhn hshkhchn' 'lvhy bdt 'lhh {s}
z 'dyn srkhy' v'chshdrfny' 'ln hrgshv 'l mlkh' vkhn 'mryn lh dryvsh mlkh' l'lmyn chyy
ch 'ty'tv khl srkhy mlkhvt' sgny' v'chshdrfny' hdbry' vfchvt' lqymh qym mlkh' vltqfh 'sr dy khl dy yb'' b'v mn khl 'lh v'nsh 'd yvmyn tltyn lhn mnkh mlkh'--ytrm' lgb 'ryvt'
t kh'n mlkh' tqym 'sr' vtrshm khtb' dy l' lhshnyh khdt mdy vfrs dy l' t'd'
y khl qbl dnh--mlkh' dryvsh rshm khtb' v'sr'
y' vdny'l khdy yd' dy rshym khtb' 'l lbyth vkhvyn ftychn lh b'lyth ngd yrvshlm vzmnyn tlth byvm' hv' brkh 'l brkhvhy vmtsl' vmvd' qdm 'lhh khl qbl dy hv' 'bd mn qdmt dnh {s}
yb 'dyn gbry' 'lkh hrgshv vhshkhchv ldny'l--b'h vmtchnn qdm 'lhh
yg b'dyn qrbv v'mryn qdm mlkh' 'l 'sr mlkh'--hl' 'sr rshmt dy khl 'nsh dy yb'' mn khl 'lh v'nsh 'd yvmyn tltyn lhn mnkh mlkh' ytrm' lgvb 'ryvt' 'nh mlkh' v'mr ytsyb' mlt' khdt mdy vfrs--dy l' t'd'
yd b'dyn 'nv v'mryn qdm mlkh'--dy dny'l dy mn bny glvt' dy yhvd l' shm 'lykh ('lkh) mlkh' t'm v'l 'sr' dy rshmt vzmnyn tlth byvm' b'' b'vth
tv 'dyn mlkh' khdy mlt' shm' shgy' b'sh 'lvhy v'l dny'l shm bl lshyzbvth v'd m'ly shmsh' hv' mshtdr lhtslvth
tz b'dyn gbry' 'lkh hrgshv 'l mlkh' v'mryn lmlkh' d' mlkh' dy dt lmdy vfrs dy khl 'sr vqym dy mlkh' yhqym l' lhshnyh
yz b'dyn mlkh' 'mr vhytyv ldny'l vrmv lgb' dy 'ryvt' 'nh mlkh' v'mr ldny'l 'lhkh dy 'nth ('nt) flch lh btdyr' hv' yshyzbnkh
ych vhytyt 'bn chdh vshmt 'l fm gb' vchtmh mlkh' b'zqth vb'zqt rbrbnvhy dy l' tshn' tsbv bdny'l
yt 'dyn 'zl mlkh' lhykhlh vbt tvt vdchvn l' hn'l qdmvhy vshnth ndt 'lvhy
kh b'dyn mlkh' bshfrfr' yqvm bngh' vbhtbhlh--lgb' dy 'ryvt' 'zl
kh' vkhmqrbh lgb'--ldny'l bql 'tsyb z'q 'nh mlkh' v'mr ldny'l dny'l 'bd 'lh' chy'--'lhkh dy 'nth ('nt) flch lh btdyr' hykhl lshyzbvtkh mn 'ryvt'
khb 'dyn dny'l 'm mlkh' mll mlkh' l'lmyn chyy
khg 'lhy shlch ml'khh vsgr fm 'ryvt'--vl' chblvny khl qbl dy qdmvhy zkhv hshtkhcht ly v'f qdmykh (qdmkh) mlkh' chbvlh l' 'bdt
khd b'dyn mlkh' shgy' t'b 'lvhy vldny'l 'mr lhnsqh mn gb' vhsq dny'l mn gb' vkhl chbl l' hshtkhch bh--dy hymn b'lhh
khh v'mr mlkh' vhytyv gbry' 'lkh dy 'khlv qrtsvhy dy dny'l vlgvb 'ryvt' rmv 'nvn bnyhvn vnshyhvn vl' mtv l'r'yt gb' 'd dy shltv bhvn 'ryvt' vkhl grmyhvn hdqv
khv b'dyn dryvsh mlkh' khtb lkhl 'mmy' 'my' vlshny' dy d'ryn (dyryn) bkhl 'r''--shlmkhvn yshg'
khz mn qdmy shym t'm--dy bkhl shltn mlkhvty lhvn z''yn (zy'yn) vdchlyn mn qdm 'lhh dy dny'l dy hv' 'lh' chy' vqym l'lmyn vmlkhvth dy l' ttchbl vshltnh 'd svf'
khch mshyzb vmtsl--v'bd 'tyn vtmhyn bshmy' vb'r'' dy shyzb ldny'l mn yd 'ryvt' [ (Daniel 6:29) kht vdny'l dnh htslch bmlkhvt dryvsh vbmlkhvt khvrsh frsy' (frs'h) {f} ]
' bshnt chdh lbl'shtsr mlkh bbl dny'l chlm chzh vchzvy r'shh 'l mshkhbh b'dyn chlm' khtb r'sh mlyn 'mr
b 'nh dny'l v'mr chzh hvyt bchzvy 'm lyly' v'rv 'rb' rvchy shmy' mgychn lym' rb'
g v'rb' chyvn rbrbn slqn mn ym' shnyn d' mn d'
d qdmyt' kh'ryh vgfyn dy nshr lh chzh hvyt 'd dy mrytv gfyh (gfh) vntylt mn 'r'' v'l rglyn kh'nsh hqymt vlbb 'nsh yhyb lh
h v'rv chyvh 'chry tnynh dmyh ldb vlshtr chd hqmt vtlt 'l'yn bfmh byn shnyh (shnh) vkhn 'mryn lh qvmy 'khly bshr shgy'
v b'tr dnh chzh hvyt v'rv 'chry khnmr vlh gfyn 'rb' dy 'vf 'l gbyh (gbh) v'rb'h r'shyn lchyvt' vshltn yhyb lh

z b'tr dnh chzh hvyt bchzvy lyly' v'rv chyvh rby'yh (rby''h) dchylh v'ymtny vtqyf' ytyrh vshnyn dy frzl lh rbrbn 'khlh vmdqh vsh'r' brglyh (brglh) rfsh vhy' mshnyh mn khl chyvt' dy qdmyh (qdmh) vqrnyn 'shr lh
ch mshtkhl hvyt bqrny' v'lv qrn 'chry z'yrh slqt bynyhvn (bynyhn) vtlt mn qrny' qdmyt' 't'qrv ('t'qrh) mn qdmyh (qdmh) v'lv 'ynyn kh'yny 'nsh' bqrn' d' vfm mmll rbrbn
t chzh hvyt 'd dy khrsvn rmyv v'tyq yvmyn ytb lbvshh khtlg chvr vsh'r r'shh kh'mr nq' khrsyh shbbyn dy nvr glglvhy nvr dlq
y nhr dy nvr ngd vnfq mn qdmvhy 'lf 'lfym ('lfyn) yshmshvnh vrbv rbvn (rbbn) qdmvhy yqvmvn dyn' ytb vsfryn ftychv
y' chzh hvyt--b'dyn mn ql mly' rbrbt' dy qrn' mmllh chzh hvyt 'd dy qtylt chyvt' vhvbd gshmh vyhybt lyqdt 'sh'
yb vsh'r chyvt' h'dyv shltnhvn v'rkhh bchyyn yhybt lhvn 'd zmn v'dn
yg chzh hvyt bchzvy lyly' v'rv 'm 'nny shmy' khbr 'nsh 'th hv' v'd 'tyq yvmy' mth vqdmvhy hqrbvhy
yd vlh yhb shltn vyqr vmlkhv vkhl 'mmy' 'my' vlshny' lh yflchvn shltnh shltn 'lm dy l' y'dh vmlkhvth dy l' ttchbl {f}
tv 'tkhryt rvchy 'nh dny'l bgv ndnh vchzvy r'shy ybhlnny
tz qrbt 'l chd mn q'my' vytsyb' 'b'' mnh 'l khl dnh v'mr ly vfshr mly' yhvd'nny
yz 'lyn chyvt' rbrbt' dy 'nyn 'rb'--'rb'h mlkhyn yqvmvn mn 'r''
ych vyqblvn mlkhvt' qdyshy 'lyvnyn vychsnvn mlkhvt' 'd 'lm' v'd 'lm 'lmy'
yt 'dyn tsbyt lytsb' 'l chyvt' rby'yt' dy hvt shnyh mn khlhvn (khlhn) dchylh ytyrh shnyh (shnh) dy frzl vtfryh (vtfrh) dy nchsh 'khlh mdqh vsh'r' brglyh (brglh) rfsh
kh v'l qrny' 'shr dy br'shh v'chry dy slqt vnflv (vnflh) mn qdmyh (qdmh) tlt vqrn' dkhn v'ynyn lh vfm mmll rbrbn vchzvh rb mn chbrth
kh' chzh hvyt--vqrn' dkhn 'bd' qrb 'm qdyshyn vykhlh lhn
khb 'd dy 'th 'tyq yvmy' vdyn' yhb lqdyshy 'lyvnyn vzmn' mth vmlkhvt' hchsnv qdyshyn
khg khn 'mr chyvt' rby'yt' mlkhv rby'yh (rby''h) thv' b'r'' dy tshn' mn khl mlkhvt' vt'khl khl 'r'' vtdvshnh vtdqnh
khd vqrny' 'shr--mnh mlkhvt' 'shrh mlkhyn yqmvn v'chrn yqvm 'chryhn vhv' yshn' mn qdmy' vtlth mlkhyn yhshfl
khh vmlyn ltsd 'ly' ('l'h) ymll vlqdyshy 'lyvnyn ybl' vysbr lhshnyh zmnyn vdt vytyhbvn bydh 'd 'dn v'dnyn vflg 'dn
khv vdyn' ytb vshltnh yh'dvn lhshmdh vlhvbdh 'd svf'
khz vmlkhvt' vshltn' vrbvt' dy mlkhvt tchvt khl shmy' yhybt l'm qdyshy 'lyvnyn mlkhvth mlkhvt 'lm vkhl shltny' lh yflchvn vyshtm'vn
khch 'd khh svf' dy mlt' 'nh dny'l shgy' r'yvny ybhlnny vzyvy yshtnvn 'ly vmlt' blby ntrt {f}
' bshnt shlvsh lmlkhvt bl'shtsr hmlkh--chzvn nr'h 'ly 'ny dny'l 'chry hnr'h 'ly btchlh
b v'r'h bchzvn vyhy br'ty v'ny bshvshn hbyrh 'shr b'ylm hmdynh v'r'h bchzvn v'ny hyyty 'l 'vbl 'vly
g v'sh' 'yny v'r'h vhnh 'yl 'chd 'md lfny h'bl vlv qrnym vhqrnym gbhvt vh'cht gbhh mn hshnyt vhgbhh 'lh b'chrnh
d r'yty 't h'yl mngch ymh vtsfvnh vngbh vkhl chyvt l' y'mdv lfnyv v'yn mtsyl mydv v'shh khrtsnv vhgdyl
h v'ny hyyty mbyn vhnh tsfyr h'zym b' mn hm'rb 'l fny khl h'rts v'yn nvg' b'rts vhtsfyr--qrn chzvt byn 'ynyv
v vyb' 'd h'yl b'l hqrnym 'shr r'yty 'md lfny h'bl vyrts 'lyv bchmt khchv
z vr'ytyv mgy' 'tsl h'yl vytmrmr 'lyv vykh 't h'yl vyshbr 't shty qrnyv vl' hyh khch b'yl l'md lfnyv vyshlykhhv 'rtsh vyrmshv vl' hyh mtsyl l'yl mydv
ch vtsfyr h'zym hgdyl 'd m'd vkh'tsmv nshbrh hqrn hgdlh vt'lnh chzvt 'rb' tchtyh l'rb' rvchvt hshmym
t vmn h'cht mhm yts' qrn 'cht mts'yrh vtgdl ytr 'l hngb v'l hmzrch v'l htsby
y vtgdl 'd tsb' hshmym vtfl 'rtsh mn htsb' vmn hkhvkhbym vtrmsm
y' v'd shr htsb' hgdyl vmmnv hrym (hvrm) htmyd vhshlkh mkhvn mqdshv
yb vtsb' tntn 'l htmyd bfsh' vtshlkh 'mt 'rtsh v'shth vhtslychh
yg v'shm'h 'chd qdvsh mdbr vy'mr 'chd qdvsh lflmvny hmdbr 'd mty hchzvn htmyd vhfsh' shmm--tt vqdsh vtsb' mrms
yd vy'mr 'ly--'d 'rb bqr 'lfym vshlsh m'vt vntsdq qdsh
tv vyhy br'ty 'ny dny'l--'t hchzvn v'bqshh bynh vhnh 'md lngdy khmr'h gbr
tz v'shm' qvl 'dm byn 'vly vyqr' vy'mr gbry'l hbn lhlz 't hmr'h
yz vyb' 'tsl 'mdy vbb'v nb'ty v'flh 'l fny vy'mr 'ly hbn bn 'dm khy l't qts hchzvn
ych vbdbrv 'my nrdmty 'l fny 'rtsh vyg' by--vy'mydny 'l 'mdy
yt vy'mr hnny mvdy'kh 't 'shr yhyh b'chryt hz'm khy lmv'd qts
kh h'yl 'shr r'yt b'l hqrnym--mlkhy mdy vfrs
kh' vhtsfyr hsh'yr mlkh yvn vhqrn hgdvlh 'shr byn 'ynyv hv' hmlkh hr'shvn
khb vhnshbrt--vt'mdnh 'rb' tchtyh 'rb' mlkhyvt mgvy y'mdnh vl' bkhchv
khg vb'chryt mlkhvtm khhtm hfsh'ym--y'md mlkh 'z fnym vmbyn chydvt
khd v'tsm khchv vl' bkhchv vnfl'vt yshchyt vhtslych v'shh vhshchyt 'tsvmym v'm qdshym
khh v'l shkhlv vhtslych mrmh bydv vblbbv ygdyl vbshlvh yshchyt rbym v'l shr shrym y'md vb'fs yd yshbr
khv vmr'h h'rb vhbqr 'shr n'mr 'mt hv' v'th stm hchzvn khy lymym rbym
khz v'ny dny'l nhyyty vnchlyty ymym v'qvm v''shh 't ml'kht hmlkh v'shtvmm 'l hmr'h v'yn mbyn {f}
' bshnt 'cht ldryvsh bn 'chshvrvsh--mzr' mdy 'shr hmlkh 'l mlkhvt khshdym
b bshnt 'cht lmlkhv 'ny dny'l bynty bsfrym msfr hshnym 'shr hyh dbr yhvh 'l yrmyh hnby' lml'vt lchrbvt yrvshlm shb'ym shnh
g v'tnh 't fny 'l 'dny h'lhym lbqsh tflh vtchnvnym--btsvm vshq v'fr
d v'tfllh lyhvh 'lhy v'tvdh v'mrh 'n' 'dny h'l hgdvl vhnvr' shmr hbryt vhchsd l'hbyv vlshmry mtsvtyv
h cht'nv v'vynv vhrsh'nv (hrsh'nv) vmrdnv vsvr mmtsvtkh vmmshftykh
v vl' shm'nv 'l 'bdykh hnby'ym 'shr dbrv bshmkh 'l mlkhynv shrynv v'btynv--v'l khl 'm h'rts
z lkh 'dny htsdqh vlnv bsht hfnym khyvm hzh l'ysh yhvdh vlyshby yrvshlm vlkhl yshr'l hqrbym vhrchqym bkhl h'rtsvt 'shr hdchtm shm bm'lm 'shr m'lv bkh
ch yhvh lnv bsht hfnym lmlkhynv lshrynv vl'btynv 'shr cht'nv lkh
t l'dny 'lhynv hrchmym vhslchvt khy mrdnv bv
y vl' shm'nv bqvl yhvh 'lhynv--llkht btvrtyv 'shr ntn lfnynv byd 'bdyv hnby'ym
y' vkhl yshr'l 'brv 't tvrtkh vsvr lblty shmv' bqlkh vttkh 'lynv h'lh vhshb'h 'shr khtvbh btvrt mshh 'bd h'lhym--khy cht'nv lv
yb vyqm 't dbryv (dbrv) 'shr dbr 'lynv v'l shftynv 'shr shftvnv--lhby' 'lynv r'h gdlh 'shr l' n'shth tcht khl hshmym kh'shr n'shth byrvshlm
yg kh'shr khtvb btvrt mshh 't khl hr'h hz't b'h 'lynv vl' chlynv 't fny yhvh 'lhynv lshvb m'vnnv vlhshkhyl b'mtkh
yd vyshqd yhvh 'l hr'h vyby'h 'lynv khy tsdyq yhvh 'lhynv 'l khl m'shyv 'shr 'shh vl' shm'nv bqlv
tv v'th 'dny 'lhynv 'shr hvts't 't 'mkh m'rts mtsrym byd chzqh vt'sh lkh shm khyvm hzh cht'nv rsh'nv
tz 'dny khkhl tsdqtkh yshb n' 'fkh vchmtkh m'yrkh yrvshlm hr qdshkh khy bcht'ynv vb'vnvt 'btynv yrvshlm v'mkh lchrfh lkhl sbybtynv
yz v'th shm' 'lhynv 'l tflt 'bdkh v'l tchnvnyv vh'r fnykh 'l mqdshkh hshmm--lm'n 'dny
ych hth 'lhy 'znkh vshm'--fqchh (fqch) 'ynykh vr'h shmmtynv vh'yr 'shr nqr' shmkh 'lyh khy l' 'l tsdqtynv 'nchnv mfylym tchnvnynv lfnykh--khy 'l rchmykh hrbym
yt 'dny shm'h 'dny slchh 'dny hqshybh v'shh 'l t'chr lm'nkh 'lhy--khy shmkh nqr' 'l 'yrkh v'l 'mkh
kh v'vd 'ny mdbr vmtfll vmtvdh cht'ty vcht't 'my yshr'l vmfyl tchnty lfny yhvh 'lhy--'l hr qdsh 'lhy
kh' v'vd 'ny mdbr btflh vh'ysh gbry'l 'shr r'yty bchzvn btchlh m'f by'f ng' 'ly kh't mncht 'rb
khb vybn vydbr 'my vy'mr--dny'l 'th yts'ty lhshkhylkh bynh
khg btchlt tchnvnykh yts' dbr v'ny b'ty lhgyd--khy chmvdvt 'th vbyn bdbr vhbn bmr'h
khd shb'ym shb'ym nchtkh 'l 'mkh v'l 'yr qdshkh lkhl' hfsh' vlchtm (vlhtm) cht'vt (cht't) vlkhfr 'vn vlhby' tsdq 'lmym vlchtm chzvn vnby' vlmshch qdsh qdshym
